data.name: Sex Hill
data.detailed_description:
Who would have thought that a town made for criminals would be the place where your life finally comes together after your sour past? A ten out of ten wife with not only an incredibly sexy body but also with a charming personality, a son and a stable job. Even though several years have passed without any trouble in Sex Hill, karma doesn't forget, and you're no exception. After a meaningless strange dream your life is slowly starting to fall apart. Has karma caught up with you after all these years, or is it all just a hallucination after a bad night's sleep? On your journey you will experience the life of a wholesome father who is slowly losing his mind.




Tired of stiff animations that don't display proper body jiggle & ripple effects? Sex Hill comes to the rescue as all animations use jiggle or ripple effects, or in some cases both!



Are you someone who likes to spice things up in bed? Don't worry, I've covered all the popular fetishes to satisfy your personal needs. Or do you prefer full-on vanilla? Again, don't worry, almost all fetishes are completely avoidable!

Boobjob, thighjob, anal, armpitjob, footjob? Sex Hill has it all!



You heard right! The game is taking place in the Myth of Angels universe, so there are some easter eggs about some characters you already know! However, as the game is based in the early 2000s, the neon-lit cities don't exist yet.

Features:

  • 1.000+ static renders
  • 50+ animated sex scenes with jiggle & ripple physics
  • Hundreds of SFX including moans and sex sounds
  • Hours of gameplay
  • Minigames and free-roam sections
  • Horror environment to keep on you on the edge
  • Collectable documents to help you connect the dots
  • Collectable hidden spicy images

data.short_description: You play as a convicted man in Sex Hill which is a town for criminals who are given a second chance at life without punishment. The town offered you everything you wished for: a beautiful wife, a son and a stable life. But one day, after a strange dream everything has taken a 180-degree turn...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MAC OS 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
